title: Lukaonia #3071
definition:
Lycaonia = "wolf land"

 1) a region in Asia Minor, situated between Pisidia, Cilicia,
    Cappadocia, Galatia and Phrygia, whose chief towns were Derbe,
    Lystra and Iconium
